_comment: Curated forward-lineage 'edge effect' edges for the L0 knowledge graph (Kevin 2026-06-05). PM-curated from data/papers/forward-lineage-verified.md, applying the no-fabrication gate: EXCLUDED DynaSwarm 2507.23261 (author-withdrawn) and non-arXiv blog sources; DROPPED unverified specifics (AFlow 'ICLR 2025 Oral'; Graph-GRPO '92.45%'); kept only abstract/full-text-confirmed numbers. edge_type: optimized_by | extended_by | standardized_into | complements | related_to | cites_example. source/target are arXiv ids. See memory knowledge-graph-dag-core.

edges.target_title: AFlow: Automating Agentic Workflow Generation
edges.what_changed: 用 MCTS 在代码化工作流空间搜索，取代手写 SOP；+5.7% 平均，GPT-4o 级 HumanEval 仅 4.55% 推理成本
edges.evidence: arxiv:2410.10762 (摘要已核实数字; 'ICLR Oral' 未核实已剔除)

edges.target_title: MetaGen: Self-Evolving Roles and Topologies for Multi-Agent LLM Reasoning
edges.what_changed: 推理时按每条 query 自进化角色与拓扑；全文 Table1 对 MetaGPT/GPTSwarm 基线大幅领先

edges.target_title: MetaAgent: Auto-Constructing Multi-Agent Systems via FSM
edges.what_changed: 用有限状态机自动构建多智能体系统，替代人工设计的 SOP 工作流
edges.evidence: arxiv:2507.22606 (与 MetaGPT 的对比需正文核实)

edges.target_title: Data Interpreter: An LLM Agent for Data Science
edges.what_changed: MetaGPT 团队的领域落地：动态分层图规划，DABench 75.9%→94.9%
edges.evidence: arxiv:2402.18679 (同团队; 摘要数字核实)

edges.target_title: SPO: Self-Supervised Prompt Optimization
edges.what_changed: MetaGPT 团队的提示自优化，1.1%–5.6% 的现有方法成本
edges.evidence: arxiv:2502.06855 (共享作者; 摘要数字核实)

edges.target_title: MacNet: Scaling LLM Multi-Agent Collaboration
edges.what_changed: 用 DAG 组织 1000+ 智能体协作，规模化 MetaGPT 式协作

edges.target_title: MetaGen: Self-Evolving Roles and Topologies for Multi-Agent LLM Reasoning
edges.what_changed: GPTSwarm 离线优化静态图 → MetaGen 推理时重写角色+拓扑：HumanEval 95.1% vs 69.6%(+25.5pp)、MMLU 93.5% vs 60.1%(+33.4pp)、token −85.7%

edges.target_title: Graph-GRPO: Stabilizing Multi-Agent Topology Learning via GRPO
edges.what_changed: 用 GRPO 替代 GPTSwarm 的 REINFORCE 优化通信图拓扑（具体数字需正文核实，已剔除）
edges.evidence: arxiv:2603.02701 (定性核实; 数字未在摘要)

edges.target_title: MASS: Multi-Agent Design — Optimizing Prompts and Topologies
edges.what_changed: 三阶段优化（块级 prompt + workflow 拓扑 + 全局 prompt），改进图/拓扑优化路线

edges.target_title: AFlow: Automating Agentic Workflow Generation
edges.what_changed: 以代码化工作流 + MCTS 搜索替代图结构边优化

edges.target_title: MacNet: Scaling LLM Multi-Agent Collaboration
edges.what_changed: DAG 组织 1000+ 智能体，延伸图式多智能体规模

edges.target_title: A Survey on Agent-as-a-Judge
edges.what_changed: 成为‘agentic 评测’子领域的首篇综述起点（LLM-as-a-Judge → Agent-as-a-Judge）

edges.target_title: When AIs Judge AIs: The Rise of Agent-as-a-Judge Evaluation
edges.what_changed: 围绕 Agent-as-a-Judge 组织的综述，内容完全一致

edges.target_title: Multi-Agent-as-Judge (MAJ-EVAL)
edges.what_changed: 多智能体辩论评判，对齐多维人类评估，扩展（非替换）Agent-as-a-Judge

edges.target_title: DRIFT: Span-Level Error Localization in Agent Trajectories
edges.what_changed: claim-centric 审计：把‘用智能体审计轨迹’推进到 span/claim 级（本站已深读）

edges.target_title: A Comprehensive Survey of Self-Evolving AI Agents
edges.what_changed: 姊妹综述：四组件优化回路视角，与 What/When/How/Where 互补（本站已深读）

edges.target_title: Darwin Gödel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
edges.what_changed: 自修改代码 + 树状归档的开放式自进化，被综述列为代表方向

edges.target_title: TRACE: Trajectory-Aware Comprehensive Evaluation for Deep Research Agents
edges.what_changed: 并行赛道：层级轨迹效用函数评估深研 agent（WWW 2026）

edges.target_title: TRAIL: Trace Reasoning and Agentic Issue Localization
edges.what_changed: 先行工作：148 条人工标注轨迹 + 错误分类体系

edges.target_title: AgentRx: Diagnosing AI Agent Failures from Execution Trajectories
edges.what_changed: 并行工作：跨域（API/incident/web）失败步骤定位

edges.target_title: Why Your Deep Research Agent Fails? On Hallucination Evaluation
edges.what_changed: 先行工作：全研究轨迹幻觉评估 + PING 分类 + DeepHalluBench
